description: Two-panel tension visualization for dialectical contrasts. Renders thesis/antithesis, foregrounded/suppressed, or early/late definition pairs with a central tension indicator. Each panel scrolls independently with compact item rows. The central node shows the relationship type, visually communicating the dialectical structure.

left_key.description: Field name (or sub-section key) for the left/thesis side items

right_key.description: Field name (or sub-section key) for the right/antithesis side items

left_label.description: Header label for the left panel

right_label.description: Header label for the right panel

relationship_label.description: Label for the central tension node

left_title_field.description: Title field for items in the left panel

right_title_field.description: Title field for items in the right panel

left_description_field.description: Description field for items in the left panel

right_description_field.description: Description field for items in the right panel

section_description.description: Optional description shown above the pair
